contentList.content: The wearer cannot be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>.

You gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> while Lightly or Heavily Obscured. Your weapons deal an additional [1] to creatures that are Lightly or Heavily Obscured.
Veil of Shadows also grants you a +[1] bonus to all <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
While obscured, the wearer has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Stealth <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag>.
These shoes seem to cast their own unnatural shadows. (Currently only visible on normal BT1)
Currently only visible on normal BT1.
Currently only visible on normal BT1.
These metal bracers are strangely pliable, almost as if they're cloth. (Currently only visible on normal BT1)
Divinely wrought, this helmet exudes otherworldly power. (Currently only visible on normal BT1)
This revealing dress is much more protective than it should be. (Currently only visible on normal BT1)
Veil of Shadows also grants a +[1] bonus to all Saving Throws.
Encase yourself with shadow, increasing your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2.
While Veil of Shadows is active, reduce all incoming damage by [1] and reflect damage received back at the attacker, who takes [2].
Veil of Shadows reduces all damage by [1] and deals [2] back at the attacker.
The wearer cannot be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>.
You have an <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> while in darkness or dim light.
Create a dark shroud that Heavily Obscures and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinds</LSTag> creatures within. Creatures cannot make ranged attacks into or out of it.
You strike at their foe's brain with pure malice, inflicting <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHA_JUSTICIAR_CALLOFTHEDARK">Call of the Dark Lady</LSTag>.
The most common face in Faerûn, humans are known for their tenacity, creativity, and endless capacity for growth.
You can command the shadows to collect at a mere thought, blinding your enemies and obscuring the ground.

When it starts its turn in a Lightly or Heavily Obscured area, the affected entity takes [1]. Attacks made by Shar while affected by her <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHA_SHAR_UMBRAL_FORM">Umbral Form</LSTag> deal an additional [2] to the entity.

On a hit, Shar deals an additional [1]. It is <LSTag Tooltip="Immune">Immune</LSTag> to non-magical damage, and can make an additional melee attack each turn. She cannot cast spells while maintaining this form.
Shar assumes her <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHA_SHAR_UMBRAL_FORM">Umbral Form</LSTag>.
Teleport to an unoccupied, obscured spot.
Encase yourself with shadow, increasing your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2.
You strike at their foe's brain with pure malice, inflicting <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHA_JUSTICIAR_CALLOFTHEDARK">Call of the Dark Lady</LSTag>.
Shar assumes her <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHA_SHAR_UMBRAL_FORM">Umbral Form</LSTag>.
Put creatures into a magical slumber. Select targets up to a combined 36HP.
